title: Contact
meta_description: Get in touch with the Static Website Generator team. We'd love to hear your questions, feedback or ideas.
og_description: Contact the Static Website Generator team for questions, feedback or support.
excerpt: Have a question or feedback? We'd love to hear from you.
content:
# Contact

Thank you for your interest in Static Website Generator.

## Get in Touch

Whether you have a question about SWG, found a bug, have a feature request or simply want to say hello, we'd love to hear from you.

## Community

Static Website Generator is built with developers in mind. Feedback and suggestions help shape the future of the project.

## Support

If you're using SWG and need assistance, please visit the documentation or reach out through the available support channels.

We look forward to hearing from you!
